description: Perform an image accessibility audit on https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the image data as a CSV file to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ ensuring the filename contains the word 'image' (e.g., 'images_audit.csv'). Analyze the data and save a text report of at least 500 characters to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/image_audit_report.txt. The report must include the total number of images found, the count of images missing alt text, at least 3 example image URLs missing alt text along with their corresponding page URLs, and a 'Recommendations' section with actionable advice.
